notes: v1.14.118 - Stage 2 router-gating (restructure mandate; HEALTH B1.1-B1.5). Stacks on v1.14.116 (B1 scope-picker fix) + v1.14.117 (Ask card Rule F). Self-gates the ungated showPage() bounces reachable from the default UI so search/scan/QR/profile no longer blank or punch through to legacy - mirrors the proven goCompass pattern: if(redesign_isOn()){<redesign route>;return;} else {<legacy showPage UNCHANGED>}. Legacy (?legacy=1) branch byte-identical. GATES: (B1.4) goOpsTab - chokepoint for 4 callers (INTENT portmap/sops, OSV idle, BOM-ingest, rack-detail SOPs) -> graceful-degrade showWorkTab('deploy') (ops cluster SOP/portmap/rackmap has no redesign home until Stage 3). (B1.1/B1.2) goOptic/goOpticVerify -> showRefTab('rf-optics') + fs-optic stab + OpticScore mode (optics re-homed). (B1.1) goCliParser -> showRefTab('rf-cli') + cs-parser (CLI re-homed). (B1.1) INTENT_MAP inline routes: power/led->rf-hw, oob->rf-cli+cs-oob, console->rf-cli+cs-console, triage->Work/Deploy, voice->openVaSheet('listening')+vaStart() (no page bounce), rackmap->Work/Deploy. (B1.3) qrDeepLink: rack deep-link PHANTOM:rack: -> Work/Deploy + deploy_showRackDetail (frame-safe via deploy_opsHost); rack-name + SOP-title matches -> graceful-degrade Work/Deploy (rackmap/SOP land in Stage 3). (B1.5) header overflow SITE PROFILE -> rd_openProfile() (SYS Profile sheet; no master bounce). Browser-verified via agent-browser: every gated route lands on the right redesign surface (optic->rf-optics, cli->rf-cli, power->rf-hw, oob->rf-cli/cs-oob, opsTab/triage->Work/Deploy, profile sheet opens), no blanks/bounces. No new assets, no CSS, no precache change. node --check x3 + sw.js, three-stamp lockstep, CRLF-preserving surgical diff. DEVICE-VERIFY: default UI - Ref-search power/optic/oob/console/cli-parser land on the right Ref tab (no blank); link-down -> Work/Deploy; Work>Scan Optic Score Verify; scan a PHANTOM:rack: QR -> redesign deploy dashboard + rack detail (no legacy flash); overflow -> SITE PROFILE -> SYS Profile sheet. Graceful-degrades (sop/rackmap/portmap) land on Work/Deploy, not blank, until Stage 3. ?legacy=1: every action still hits its legacy page (byte-identical).
